hypotheses.title: FCD Predicts Donnan-Mediated Cationic Antibiotic Partitioning
hypotheses.key_weakness: Negligible Donnan effect at physiological 150mM NaCl (K~1.02 for tobramycin). Only significant at low ionic strength. Specific binding dominates.

hypotheses.title: Aggregate Modulus H_a Predicts Debridement Better Than G'/G''
hypotheses.key_weakness: Technical challenge measuring Pa-level forces in confined compression. 100x ratio claim may be overestimated.

hypotheses.title: Opposite Donnan Swelling for Pel vs Alginate Biofilms
hypotheses.key_weakness: Sign error in core mechanism (both positive and negative FCD swell at low ionic strength). Ca2+ differential effect already explained by known egg-box chemistry.

hypotheses.title: Biphasic Creep Time Constant Predicts Convective Penetration Timescale
hypotheses.key_weakness: Parameter uncertainty spans 4+ orders of magnitude. Derived prediction, not standalone. Shear vs compression loading mismatch.

hypotheses.title: Fiber Matrix Model Predicts Biofilm Permeability
hypotheses.key_weakness: Low novelty (existing porous media models). Structural mismatch (biofilm =/= uniform fiber network).

hypotheses.title: Streaming Potential Reveals Spatial FCD Heterogeneity
hypotheses.key_weakness: Biological noise from live bacteria may overwhelm streaming potential signal. Resolution may be insufficient for EPS zones.

hypotheses.title: Poroelastic Pumping Enhances Biofilm Nutrient Transport
hypotheses.key_weakness: Loading mode mismatch (shear vs compression). Nutrient delivery non-problem at biofilm scale. Channel transport dominates.

hypotheses.title: Net FCD Transitions During Maturation with Ionic Sensitivity Reversal
hypotheses.key_weakness: Limited to CF mucoid P. aeruginosa. Spatial heterogeneity makes net FCD physically ambiguous. Therapeutic window timing impractical.

critic_questions: Can Donnan partitioning effects be distinguished from specific binding at the molecular level?
What modified confined compression design works at Pa forces?
Does triphasic theory add predictive power beyond existing Ca2+-alginate chemistry?
Can streaming potential be measured in dead biofilm to eliminate biological noise?
What is the actual ionic strength range in CF airway surface liquid?
